sectiondef.header: TPDO service: the TPDO Communication Parameter object 0x1800 modification using SDO

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800)

detaileddescription.para: When the download indication function for the object 0x1800 is called with a non-zero abort code
Then the same abort code value is returned, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a value longer than the sub-object's data type length is downloaded to the sub-object
Then CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN_HI abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with no sub-object at a given sub-index

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to the sub-index
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Highest sub-index supported" sub-object (0x00)

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_WRITE abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "COB-ID used by TPDO" sub-object (0x01)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object remains unchanged calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "COB-ID used by TPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to a valid COB-ID

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "COB-ID used by TPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to an invalid COB-ID

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_net_get_time() calls can_recv_stop() calls can_timer_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "COB-ID used by TPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to a valid COB-ID

detaileddescription.para: When an invalid COB-ID with the same CAN-ID is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_stop() calls can_timer_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "COB-ID used by TPDO" sub-object (0x01) set to a valid COB-ID

detaileddescription.para: When the same valid COB-ID, but with the CO_PDO_COBID_FRAME bit set is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_stop() calls can_timer_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "COB-ID used by TPDO" sub-object (0x01)

detaileddescription.para: When a invalid COB-ID with the 29-bit Extended Identifier, but with no CO_PDO_COBID_FRAME bit set is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When a reserved transmission type value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t) configured with the RTR not allowed in COB-ID, the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When the RTR-only (synchronous) transmission type value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t) configured with the RTR not allowed in COB-ID, the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When the RTR-only (event-driven) transmission type value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t) configured with the RTR allowed in COB-ID, the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When an RTR-only transmission type value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls can_recv_start() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When a transmission type value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Transmission type" sub-object (0x02)

detaileddescription.para: When the maximum transmission type value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Inhibit time" sub-object (0x03)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Inhibit time" sub-object (0x03); the TPDO is valid

detaileddescription.para: When a time value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Inhibit time" sub-object (0x03); the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a time value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Compatibility entry" sub-object (0x04)

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Event timer" sub-object (0x05)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Event timer" sub-object (0x05); the event timer is enabled

detaileddescription.para: When a new timer value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service; the event timer is updated and restarted calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16() calls can_timer_stop() calls can_timer_timeout() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "Event timer" sub-object (0x05); the event timer is enabled

detaileddescription.para: When a zero timer value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service; the event timer is stopped and disabled calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u16() calls can_timer_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "SYNC start value" sub-object (0x06)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object
Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "SYNC start value" sub-object (0x06); the TPDO is valid

detaileddescription.para: When a start value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Communication Parameter object (0x1800) with the "SYNC start value" sub-object (0x06); the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a start value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_dn()

sectiondef.header: TPDO service: the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00-0x1bfff) modification using SDO

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00)

detaileddescription.para: When the download indication function for the object 0x1a00 is called with a non-zero abort code
Then the same abort code value is returned, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a value longer than the sub-object's data type length is downloaded to the sub-object
Then CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN_HI abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00)

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object remains unchanged calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00); the TPDO is valid

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00); the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a value larger than CO_PDO_NUM_MAPS is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) and an "Application object" entry with an empty mapping; the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new number of mapped objects value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_dev_chk_tpdo() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) and an "Application object" entry with a mapping that exceeds the maximum PDO length; the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new number of mapped objects value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PDO_LEN abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) and an "Application object" entry that maps into a non-existing object; the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new number of mapped objects value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_OBJ abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_dev_chk_tpdo()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00); the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a zero value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) and some "Application object" entires; the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a non-zero value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u8() calls co_dev_chk_tpdo() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When the same value as the current sub-object's value is downloaded to the sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object remains unchanged calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the TPDO is valid

detaileddescription.para: When a new mapping value is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) does not equal zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new mapping value is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When an empty mapping value is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_dev_chk_tpdo() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a mapping that maps into a non-existing object is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_OBJ abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_dev_chk_tpdo()

briefdescription.para: Given a started TPDO service (co_tpdo_t), the object dictionary contains the TPDO Mapping Parameter object (0x1a00) with the "Number of mapped objects" sub-object (0x00) equal to zero and with an "Application object" sub-object (0x01-0x40); the TPDO is invalid

detaileddescription.para: When a new mapping value is downloaded to the "Application object" sub-object

Then a zero abort code is passed to the download confirmation function, the sub-object is set to the requested value and the value is updated in the service calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_dev_chk_tpdo() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen Library Unit Test Suite.

detaileddescription.para:
